# Raqhama Formation

**Summary**: A Miocene carbonate formation in the Red Sea Basin.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2022-al-sadah|Al-Sadah, 2022]] studied the raqhama-formation to characterize its stratigraphic position.

## Depositional Environment

- [[2022-al-sadah|Al-Sadah, 2022]] marine carbonate platform

## Reservoir Properties



## Diagenetic History

- [[2022-al-sadah|Al-Sadah, 2022]] anhydrite cementation in some areas

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The formation contains a basal reef limestone followed by conglomerate and siliciclastics. ([[2022-al-sadah|Al-Sadah, 2022, p. 85]])
